mapper.insert: insert ignore into favorites (user_id, problem_id, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{problemId}, now())
mapper.select: select f.problem_id as problemId, p.title as problemTitle, p.difficulty as difficulty, p.support_languages as supportLanguagesJson, f.created_at as favoritedAt from favorites f join problems p on p.id = f.problem_id where f.user_id = #{userId} order by f.created_at desc, f.id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
